description: Each array entry is one wave (turn). A wave can be a single string (sent to every conversation), an array of per-conversation strings, or an object { default, byKind, byIndex }. Wave k drives turn k.
waves: What is the capital of Norway? Answer in one sentence.
Write a TypeScript debounce function with cancel and flush methods.
Is there sugar in regular Coca-Cola? Reply yes or no only.
Return JSON only with keys id, task, done for a sample todo. No prose.
Now give the shorter, final version of your previous answer.

waves.default: State one assumption you made and why.

byIndex.1: Add one edge-case unit test for that function and explain what it protects against.
